mapper.select:
SELECT eduChapterContent.* , eduCourseChapter.chapter_name AS chapterName FROM edu_chapter_content eduChapterContent LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduChapterContent.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id
ORDER BY eduChapterContent.sort_order ASC, eduChapterContent.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_chapter_content eduChapterContent LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduChapterContent.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id

SELECT eduChapterContent.* , eduCourseChapter.chapter_name AS chapterName FROM edu_chapter_content eduChapterContent LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduChapterContent.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id
ORDER BY eduChapterContent.sort_order ASC, eduChapterContent.create_time DESC

SELECT eduChapterContent.* , eduCourseChapter.chapter_name AS chapterName FROM edu_chapter_content eduChapterContent LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter eduCourseChapter ON eduChapterContent.chapter_id = eduCourseChapter.id WHERE eduChapterContent.id = #{id}
